creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
(In reply to doctor from comment #3)
This is the default and not need to be set in php.ini. The problem is that MySQL packages and older MariaDB packages are using /tmp/mysql.sock but newer MariaDB packages /var/run/mysql/mysql.sock.

I know what and where to set to "fix" it. But this is not the point of this PR. The point is we have many "mysql-like" packages but they cannot be used as drop-in replacement anymore. 

If user installed MySQL and PHP on FreeBSD in the last 20 years it just works. PHP and other application can connect to DB without the need of any modification in php.ini etc. But this is no longer true and changed path to socket brings no benefit.
